title: MSDU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: MSDU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: MSDU Result 2026 has been announced for 1st, 3rd, and 5th semester students of BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, MA, MSc, MCom, and LLM on the official website msduexam.co.in. You can use the direct link provided and follow the steps to download your result.

content.text: Maharaja Suhail Dev University has officially released the MSDU Result 2026 for various UG and PG courses, including BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, MA, MSc, MCom and LLM for 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester, along with several back paper results on its examination portal. These results cover multiple programmes such as MSc 1st and 3rd Semester, MCom 1st and 3rd Semester, MA 1st and 3rd Semester, BA/BSc/BCom/BBA 1st Semester Back Paper, 3rd and 5th Semester, and LLM 1st Semester Back Paper and 3rd Semester. MSDU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - msduexam.co.in.

Students can check and download their MSDU result by visiting the result portal, selecting the year, exam type, course and semester, and then entering their roll number to view the marksheet online. After downloading the provisional scorecard, candidates must carefully verify their personal details, subject-wise marks, SGPA/CGPA and overall result status and immediately contact the university or college in case of any discrepancy in the published result.

MSDU has published the odd semester results 2026 for a wide range of UG and PG courses on its official result portal msduexam.co.in. The university has made available the results for regular and back paper students of BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, MA, MSc, MCom and LLM for 1st, 3rd and 5th semesters, which can be accessed online using roll number-based login.

MSDU has activated the direct link on its official result portal for students to check the MSDU Result 2026 for UG and PG odd semester and back paper examinations. By using the link below, candidates can directly access the result dashboard, select their exam details and download the provisional marksheet for BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, MA, MSc, MCom and LLM courses.

links.label: MSDU UG and PG 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester Results 2026 (BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, MA, MSc, MCom, LLM - Regular and Back Paper)

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your MSDU Result 2026 online from the official result portal:

items: Visit the official MSDU result portal https://msduexam.co.in/.
On the homepage, select the Year as 2026.
Choose the Exam Type (UG/PG, Back Paper, etc.) from the dropdown.
Select your Course Name (BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, MA, MSc, MCom, LLM).
Select the relevant Semester (1st, 3rd or 5th Semester).
Enter your Roll Number or other required login details.
Click on Search Result or Submit to view your marksheet.
Download the displayed result and take a printout for future reference.

structured_links.label: MSDU UG and PG 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester Results 2026 (BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, MA, MSc, MCom, LLM - Regular and Back Paper)
